title: FY2026 Q2 Security Compliance Directive — All Sites
body: Effective immediately, all sites must ensure their self-inspection reports are submitted and approved no later than 30 days after the inspection date. The current backlog at Dayton is unacceptable. All FSOs are directed to prioritize self-inspection completion and report submission above other administrative tasks until we achieve enterprise-wide green status.
actionItems: Submit self-inspection report within 30 days of inspection completion
Contact your assigned admin if you need assistance with documentation
All sites with outstanding reports must submit by June 1, 2026

title: Q3 2026 Strategic Security Priorities
body: Our three strategic priorities for Q3 2026 are: (1) Achieve 100% current self-inspection status across all 8 sites. (2) Prepare all sites with scheduled DCSA inspections — Colorado Springs, Niceville, and Las Vegas — for outstanding results. (3) Implement the enterprise-wide documentation binder standard established by Las Vegas. All sites should have both physical and digital binders in place by September 1.
actionItems: Achieve current inspection status for all sites by August 1
Request documentation template from Corporate Security
Schedule quarterly mini-inspection (see Huntsville Best Practice)
Confirm DCSA pre-inspection preparation meetings are scheduled

title: Dayton Site — CISO Assessment & Support Plan
body: The Dayton site is currently 72 days overdue on its self-inspection and has the lowest compliance score in the enterprise at 72%. This is a new site with limited FSO experience. I have personally reviewed the situation and have directed Corporate Security to provide direct hands-on support. This is not a performance issue — it is a capacity and experience gap that we will close together. The Dayton FSO (C. Huang) has my full support.
actionItems: Corporate Security assigned to assist Dayton through first full inspection cycle
Weekly check-in calls scheduled with Dayton FSO
Target: Dayton self-inspection submitted by June 15, 2026

title: Mandatory: Share Lessons Learned Across All Sites
body: I am directing all FSOs to review the Las Vegas documentation binder approach and the Huntsville quarterly mini-inspection practice — both are in the Lessons Learned section. These are proven practices that every site should adopt. Knowledge sharing across our enterprise is a force multiplier. If your site has learned something valuable, you are expected to post it in Lessons Learned for your peers.
actionItems: Review all lessons learned entries in the Lessons Learned section
Adopt Las Vegas documentation binder approach at your site
Post at least one lesson learned or best practice from your site by Q3
Contact your admin if you need template documentation
